tracks.rawText: 3:52duranv5.5CoverAlternative rock track in 4/4 time at 120 BPM in the key of B minor, The arrangement features a prominent, overdriven electric guitar playing a syncopated, rhythmic riff with a slight wah-wah filter effect, A clean electric guitar provides arpeggiated textures in the background, The bass guitar follows the kick drum closely with a gritty, distorted tone, The drum kit uses a tight, dry snare and a punchy kick, with frequent eighth-note hi-hat patterns and occasional crash cymbal accents, Male vocals are delivered with a raspy, emotive quality, shifting into a powerful belt during the chorus, The production is dense, with layered vocal harmonies and a slight reverb on the lead vocal, A bridge section features a more atmospheric, stripped-back arrangement with sustained guitar chords and a steady, driving beat before returning to the high-energy chorus1PublishRemix
tracks.title: duran

tracks.rawText: 3:47duranv5.5CoverAlternative rock track in 4/4 time at 120 BPM in the key of B minor, The arrangement features a prominent, overdriven electric guitar playing a syncopated, rhythmic riff with a slight wah-wah filter effect, A clean electric guitar provides arpeggiated textures in the background, The bass guitar follows the kick drum closely with a gritty, distorted tone, The drum kit uses a tight, dry snare and a punchy kick, with frequent eighth-note hi-hat patterns and occasional crash cymbal accents, Male vocals are delivered with a raspy, emotive quality, shifting into a powerful belt during the chorus, The production is dense, with layered vocal harmonies and a slight reverb on the lead vocal, A bridge section features a more atmospheric, stripped-back arrangement with sustained guitar chords and a steady, driving beat before returning to the high-energy chorusPublishRemix
tracks.title: duran

tracks.rawText: 3:23Who do you love? v5.5[Intro] [overdriven electric guitar riff with wah-filter, syncopated drums] [Verse 1] [raspy male vocals] Who do you love? [clean arpeggiated guitar enters] When you come undone Who do you need? Who do you love? When you come undone [Chorus] [full band, distorted bass, driving drums] Whoa, play me déjà vu Like a radio tune I swear I've heard before Chill, is it something real? Or the magic I'm feeling Off your fingertips [Verse 2] [guitar riff continues, heavy snare hits] Who do you love? When you come undone Who do you need? Who do you love? When you come undone [Bridge] [atmospheric sustained guitar chords, steady kick drum] My immaculate dream Made of breath and skin I've been waiting for your sign With a home tattoo Happy birthday to you Was created for your sign [Chorus] [vocal belt, layered harmonies] Can't help it if I fall apart At the seams Can't believe you're taking my heart Too easy Oh, it'll take a little time Might take a little cry To come undone, now we'll try To sPublishRemix
tracks.title: Who do you love?
